title: Сosmetic hats pack rp
description: The package adds various models of cosmetic hats, etc.
body:
# Сosmetic hats pack
Models of hats will be added to this set of resources. To do this, you will need to rename the carved pumpkin on the anvil.

# Dependencies
This pack requires Optifine or CIT Resewn, either can be downloaded below:
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

I advise you to install this [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
  
# list of all renames:
